questions.question: The ancient Indian city of Taxila was located in which modern-day country?
questions.explanation: Taxila was an ancient city located in the northwestern part of the Indian subcontinent, which is now in modern-day Pakistan.

questions.question: What is the largest river island in the world, located in India?
questions.explanation: Majuli is the largest river island in the world, located in the Brahmaputra River in the state of Assam, India.

questions.question: Which article of the Indian Constitution deals with the right to equality?
questions.explanation: Article 14 of the Indian Constitution deals with the right to equality, which states that the state shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.

questions.question: What is the name of the Indian government's program to promote digital payments and reduce cash transactions?
